response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack/web engineer with strong JS/TypeScript and DLang background, but the role explicitly requires a Senior C++ developer with deep expertise in STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IoT protocols (MQTT/Modbus/OPC UA), and IEC 62443 secure development for industrial automation. C++ exposure is limited to a short stint at National Instruments (2014-2015) and an academic project, with no recent C++, industrial automation, or cybersecurity standards experience. Skills section does not even list C++.
strengths: 8+ years senior engineering experience with strong software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD)
Has touched C/C++ at National Instruments and built a low-level audio system in C++
concerns: No recent or sustained C++/STL production experience; primary stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang
No exposure to IEC 62443, SDL, industrial cybersecurity, or industrial protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, IEC 61850)
No IoT/MQTT, message broker, or industrial automation domain experience
